issues.description: metadata allowlist test uses PUBLIC_METADATA_KEYS itself as the oracle and only checks subset membership. That can false-pass if the allowlist is later widened with another sensitive key such as accessSecret/token/clientSecret, or if public keys like height/rows/seed/generatedAt/processingTime are accidentally omitted from the DTO. I did not find a current prompt/workflow/comfyuiJobId/userId leak in GET /api/assets/[id].
issues.recommendation: Lock the allowlist with a literal expected tuple, add sensitive extras such as accessSecret/token/clientSecret to the fixture, and assert the normalized metadata key set exactly equals the approved public keys present in the completed fixture.
issues.deferRationale: Test-hardening only; the current implementation path is allowlisted and does not expose the targeted fields.
